title: elatinoides spuria
side_effects: Elatinoides spuria can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal problems, including diarrhea, vomiting, and stomach pain, due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can also cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and blistering. In extreme cases, ingesting the plant can lead to more serious health issues, including kidney and liver damage, and even respiratory failure. If not handled correctly, the plant can release toxic fumes, causing headaches, dizziness, and respiratory problems.
